Launch a campaign
Powered by Benna AI · One campaign, four AI surfaces

Reach four AI surfaces
from one campaign.

SuperBoost Ads runs across MCP tools (Claude Desktop, Cursor), web AI chat, browser extensions, and chat bots — so your brand shows up wherever your audience is using AI. Bid in real time. Target by intent, not cookies. Pay only for real outcomes.

Launch your first campaign → See how bidding works
No setup fees · $100 starter credit · Live in under 10 minutes
Your reach

Four AI surfaces. One campaign.

Your campaign automatically distributes across every AI surface where your audience lives — MCP tools, web AI apps, browser extensions, and chat bots. Targeting decides where it lands; the auction picks the moment.

Door 1 · MCP tools

Inside Claude Desktop & Cursor

Your ad renders alongside MCP tool results. Highest-intent surface — developers seeing your brand the moment they ask "how do I deploy."

surface: tool_response
Door 2 · AI apps

Inline in web AI chat

ChatGPT-likes, vertical AI tools, agent UIs. Your sponsored card renders inline, same chrome as the AI's own messages — never interruptive.

surface: chat
Door 3 · Extensions

Browser side panels

Chrome, Edge, Firefox AI extensions — summarizers, writing assistants, sidebars. Contextual to whatever the user is reading. No surveillance, no cookies.

surface: sidebar
Door 4 · Bots

Discord, Telegram, Slack

AI bots reply with your sponsored message in the platform's native format — Discord embed, Telegram card, Slack attachment. Same campaign, three formats.

surface: chat (bot)

Your ads shown inside

Claude ChatGPT Cursor Perplexity Replit Windsurf
AI-native targeting · powered by Benna AI

Target by what users are trying to do — not who they are.

Cookies are dead. Demographics are lazy. SuperBoost bids on real-time MCP signals — the intent, tools, and context of every AI session — so your ad lands the moment it's actually useful. Every bid is scored by Benna AI, our AI optimization engine — so you only pay when the signal actually predicts conversion.

  • ✓Intent signals — bid on "writing a pitch deck" or "debugging Python," not "males 25–34."
  • ✓Tool context — target by which MCP tools and models are active in session.
  • ✓Benna AI auto-optimization — set a target CPA, the engine adjusts bids on every auction. benna.ai ↗
  • ✓Zero PII — all signals anonymized and aggregated at the protocol layer.
Start targeting by intent →
Campaign: Cursor — Q2 dev acquisition
Matching intent signals
debugging python writing tests refactoring code code review searching docs
Active MCP tools
filesystem github terminal
// RTB bid request · 47ms
match: intent="debug python",
  model="claude-sonnet"
bid: $3.42 CPM · WON
// served in 18ms
Performance dashboard

Every campaign. Every signal. One pane of glass.

Launch, pause, clone, and optimize campaigns in seconds. Live spend, conversion, and eCPA data — no 24-hour attribution lag. Automated rules pause underperformers for you.

  • ✓Sub-second reporting — every bid, impression, and conversion streams live.
  • ✓Auto-optimization rules — set CPA targets, we shift budget automatically.
  • ✓Creative A/B — rotate variants and let the bidder pick winners.
Open the dashboard →
Cursor — Dev Acquisition Q2 Active
Spend $12,480 CVR 4.8% eCPA $1.93
Notion AI — Retention Boost Active
Spend $8,210 CVR 3.2% eCPA $2.47
Figma — Designer Upsell Paused
Spend $4,550 CVR 2.1% eCPA $3.80
Why SuperBoost Ads

Ad tech rebuilt for the agent era.

Google's stack was built for web pages. Facebook's was built for feeds. We built ours for AI sessions — the new primary surface.

⚡

Context-aware bidding

Our auction sees the live session — what the user just asked, which tools fired, what came back. Bids go up when relevance goes up.

🎯

Frictionless placements

Ads render as native cards inside AI chats and agent flows — not pop-ups, not banners. Users convert because the ad actually belongs there.

📈

Transparent economics

See exactly what you pay, who you reach, and what converted. No black-box attribution. No hidden arbitrage. One clean take rate.

0
Monthly AI sessions
0
vs. traditional display CTR
$0
Average eCPA
0
Median bid latency

From brief to bid in under 10 minutes.

No account managers. No minimum spend. No waitlist. Log in, set a goal, let the auction do the rest.

1
🎯

Set your target

Pick an outcome — installs, signups, purchases — and a CPA goal. Upload creative or write copy inline.

2
⚡

Bid in real time

Our auction evaluates every AI session against your targeting and bids on the ones most likely to convert.

3
📊

Scale what works

Live dashboards surface winning creatives and audiences. Auto-rules reallocate budget every 15 minutes.

Pricing

Pay for outcomes. No agency tax.

Three ways to buy. All self-serve. All transparent. Your take rate is always posted on your dashboard.

Self-serve

CPM

$2.40/k
Pay per thousand AI-native impressions. Best for awareness.
  • ✓$100 minimum spend
  • ✓All placements
  • ✓Live reporting
Start with CPM
Most popular

CPC

$0.38/click
Pay only when an AI user actually clicks through.
  • ✓$50 minimum spend
  • ✓Auto-optimized bidding
  • ✓Creative A/B built-in
  • ✓$100 starter credit

Performance

CPA

target-based
Pay only on signup, install, or purchase. Machine-learned bidding.
  • ✓$500 minimum spend
  • ✓Conversion tracking SDK
  • ✓Dedicated optimization
Talk to us
PREMIUM · DIRECT

Brand Deals — guaranteed AI-native placements.

For non-tech brands that want to be seen by AI-native users with purchasing power — developers, researchers, early adopters, knowledge workers. Negotiated directly. Priced on reach, not auction.

🎯

Guaranteed inventory

Lock exclusive placement inside specific AI tools, workflows, or session contexts for a defined period. Your brand, no auction, no surprises.

💎

Fixed CPM pricing

Negotiated rates from $12 CPM. Predictable spend across the campaign window. Ideal for product launches, seasonal pushes, or category ownership.

🤝

White-glove ops

Dedicated account manager, custom creative review, Benna AI audience match reports, and weekly performance readouts.

WHO THIS IS FOR

Consumer brands (Coca-Cola, Samsung, Nike), auto (BMW, Tesla), finance (Chase, AmEx), and premium services that want first-touch access to the highest-intent digital audience on the planet — users inside AI tools.

Talk to our brand team →
Typical deals: $50k–$2M · 30–90 day campaigns · Approvals in under 1 week
"Boost Boss Ads is the first platform where our cost-per-signup actually went down as we scaled. AI-native targeting is the real thing — our pitch lands in the exact session a dev needs us."
Sarah Chen · Head of Growth, Cursor
